name: io.github.wyre-technology/connectwise-manage-mcp
title: ConnectWise Manage
description: MCP server for ConnectWise Manage PSA — companies, tickets, projects, time entries, and more.

environmentVariables.name: CW_MANAGE_COMPANY_ID
environmentVariables.description: ConnectWise company identifier (the short name used to log in)

environmentVariables.name: CW_MANAGE_PUBLIC_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ConnectWise API member public key (Members > API Members)

environmentVariables.name: CW_MANAGE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Client ID from the ConnectWise Developer Portal (developer.connectwise.com)

environmentVariables.name: CW_MANAGE_URL
environmentVariables.description: ConnectWise API base URL — region-specific (api-na/eu/au.myconnectwise.net) or self-hosted

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
